VAL-INTEG-001.details: Test 'integration_stress_multi_subsystem_1500_ops' passed — exercises IPC (channel create/signal/close) + scheduling (context create/bind/borrow/return) + allocation (heap alloc/free) simultaneously across multiple simulated threads with 1500 operations (exceeds 1000 minimum). Additional test 'integration_stress_concurrent_threads_1200_ops' also passed with 1200 operations. No panics or corruption.

VAL-INTEG-002.details: Multiple process lifecycle churn tests passed: 'integration_stress_process_churn_with_handle_transfer_75_cycles' (75 cycles with handle transfer), 'integration_stress_process_churn_interleaved_60' (60 interleaved cycles), 'integration_stress_process_churn_kill_before_start_50' (50 cycles), 'integration_stress_process_churn_multi_handle_transfer_50' (50 cycles with multi-handle transfer), 'churn_process_create_kill_150_cycles' (150 cycles), 'churn_process_create_kill_without_start_100_cycles' (100 cycles). All exceed 50 minimum. No resource leaks.

VAL-INTEG-003.details: Full test suite completed: 1336 tests passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored across all test binaries. Well above the 943 baseline. All milestone tests from M1-M8 included and passing.

VAL-INTEG-004.details: 'cargo build --release' completed successfully with exit code 0. No errors. Output: 'Finished `release` profile [optimized] target(s) in 0.00s'.

VAL-INTEG-005.details: Stale waiter cleanup tests all passed: 'integration_stress_stale_waiter_cleanup_basic' (thread calls wait, is woken by one handle, calls wait again — stale registrations cleaned up), 'integration_stress_stale_waiter_no_spurious_wakeup' (verifies no spurious wakeups after cleanup), 'integration_stress_stale_waiter_cleanup_mixed_types' (mixed handle types), 'integration_stress_stale_waiter_cleanup_timeout_timer' (timeout timer path), 'integration_stress_stale_waiter_repeated_cycles_50' (50 repeated cycles), 'kill_leaves_stale_waiter_registrations' (edge case). All pass.

VAL-CROSS-001.details: All M1 bug fix tests still pass after all subsequent audit changes (M3-M8): channel_create_leak (3 tests: test_channel_create_leak_first_map_fails, test_channel_create_leak_second_map_fails, test_channel_create_leak_slots_reusable_after_cleanup — all ok), sched_context_create_leak (4 tests: test_sched_context_create_leak_context_freed_on_full_table, test_sched_context_create_leak_id_reusable_after_cleanup, test_sched_context_create_leak_multiple_failures_dont_accumulate, test_sched_context_create_success_path_unaffected — all ok), handle_send_rollback (7 tests including test_handle_send_rollback_handle_insert_fails_fixed_cleans_up, test_handle_send_rollback_second_map_fails_fixed_cleans_up — all ok), channel_create_pte_leak (5 tests including test_channel_create_pte_leak_first_map_fails_no_leak, test_channel_create_pte_leak_second_map_fails_fixed — all ok).

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Build succeeds clean. Full test suite: 1336 passed, 0 failed (baseline 943). Multi-subsystem stress (1500 ops), process churn (up to 150 cycles), stale waiter cleanup, and all M1 bug fix tests confirmed stable.
